case_title: HAMILTON, DETROY et al vs. PHILLIPS, DEMITA A. et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, DETROY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-11-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
JUDGE PRO-TEM MONICA BAUM;MNORMAN,REPORTER;DOKAZAKI/JPASTOR, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, DEMITA A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 80 VENUS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO VACATE BY 30-SEP-96 MIDNIGHT. THERE SHALL BE NO FURT THER CONTINUANCES. THERE SHALL BE NO RIGHT TO APPEAL. DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO SECURITY DEPOSIT IN EXCHANGE FOR PLAINTIFF WAIVING RIGHT TO BACK RENT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY'S FEES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ANY FURTHER DETAILS
